calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2016 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2016 Continued To Mar-23-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT GLIDE MEMORIAL UNITED METHODIST CHURCH'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT -
Glide's demurrer to the first amended complaint is sustained with twenty days leave to amend. Mr. Levy has requested the opportunity to file a second amended complaint and may do so within twenty days. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/hk

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-03-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT GLIDE MEMORIAL UNITED METHODIST CHURCH'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IN THE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - Glide's motion to strike the claim for punitive damages is granted. Mr. Levy's request to file a second amended complaint states that he wants to remove his demand for punitive damages. This statement is, in essences, confirmation of the merits of the motion to strike. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =(302/HK)
